acceptanceSignals: PostgreSQL topology + PgBouncer RW/RO services are declared/testable.
Runtime uses pooled RW/RO endpoints (no direct DB pod connections).
SvelteKit adapter-node frontend Deployment/Service + cache-control behavior are declared.

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Runtime Infrastructure Security and Access Baseline (attempt 3)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Runtime Infrastructure Security and Access Baseline in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace satisfies the Runtime Infrastructure Security and Access Baseline for this feature: PostgreSQL topology plus PgBouncer RW/RO services are declared with transaction pool mode; runtime deployments are wired to pooled `DATABASE_RW_URL`/`DATABASE_RO_URL` endpoints (no legacy `DATABASE_URL` in Kubernetes runtime deployments); Gateway + TLS/CORS/request-size/rate-limit policies, default-deny network policy with scoped allow rules, and ExternalSecret-based secret externalization with dual-key rotation wiring are declared; and SvelteKit adapter-node frontend Deployment/Service plus cache-control behavior are declared and covered by feature tests. The active API-contract policy is satisfied for this feature because no API contract boundary artifacts were changed. Test execution was attempted but blocked by the read-only sandbox (`target/debug/.cargo-lock` permission).

reinforcementResults.name: Canonical File Storage Gate
reinforcementResults.summary:
Pass. The workspace declares and enforces the runtime infra/security baseline for this feature: PostgreSQL topology with separate PgBouncer RW/RO transaction pools (`ops/kubernetes/base/postgres-topology.yaml`, `ops/kubernetes/base/pgbouncer.yaml`), runtime RW/RO DB endpoint wiring via externalized secrets in all runtime deployments (`deployment*.yaml` + `external-secrets.yaml`), gateway TLS/CORS/request-size/rate-limit policies (`ops/kubernetes/base/gateway.yaml`), default-deny plus scoped network isolation (`networkpolicy-default-deny.yaml`, `networkpolicy-runtime-allow.yaml`), and SvelteKit adapter-node frontend Deployment/Service plus cache-control contract (`deployment-web.yaml`, `service-web.yaml`, `apps/web/src/hooks.server.ts`, `apps/web/tests/hooks.test.ts`).

Active object-storage policy checks are also satisfied in-repo: MIME/size validation is enforced in the upload pipeline before artifact acceptance (`src/object_storage.rs`, object-storage upload handler tests in `src/bin/observability_runtime_service.rs`), artifact persistence uses managed `s3://` references rather than DB binary/base64 payload paths (`src/vendor_compliance.rs`, `src/menu_supply_window.rs`, `src/vendor_fulfillment.rs`), and bucket access provisioning is explicitly restricted (`ops/kubernetes/base/job-object-storage-provision.yaml` sets anonymous access to `none`).

Note: I could not execute `cargo test --test runtime_infrastructure_security_baseline` in this environment because the workspace is read-only and Cargo could not create `target/debug/.cargo-lock`.

reinforcementResults.name: Runtime Security Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The runtime infrastructure security/access baseline is satisfied in this workspace: PostgreSQL topology plus PgBouncer RW/RO Deployments+Services are declared and test-covered; runtime Deployments are wired to `DATABASE_RW_URL`/`DATABASE_RO_URL` (with legacy `DATABASE_URL` excluded); Gateway manifests include TLS-only listener plus CORS, request-size, and rate-limit controls; default-deny and allowlist NetworkPolicies are present; credentials are sourced via ExternalSecret (no plaintext Kubernetes Secret manifests in the baseline) with dual-key rotation entries where required; and SvelteKit adapter-node frontend Deployment/Service plus cache-control contract are declared and validated.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace satisfies this feature’s active policy and acceptance signals: `ops/kubernetes/base/postgres-topology.yaml` + `pgbouncer.yaml` declare CNPG topology and separate RW/RO PgBouncer services in transaction mode; runtime deployments use `DATABASE_RW_URL`/`DATABASE_RO_URL` (no legacy `DATABASE_URL`) with network policies enforcing runtime-to-PgBouncer isolation and default-deny (`networkpolicy-default-deny.yaml`, `networkpolicy-runtime-allow.yaml`); edge controls enforce HTTPS/TLS, CORS, request-size, and rate limiting (`gateway.yaml`); secrets are externalized with dual-key rotation wiring (`external-secrets.yaml`); and the SvelteKit adapter-node frontend deployment/service and cache-control contract are declared (`deployment-web.yaml`, `service-web.yaml`, `apps/web/src/hooks.server.ts`) and covered by `tests/runtime_infrastructure_security_baseline.rs`.

executionConstraints: Use PgBouncer transaction mode with separate RW/RO services.
Include frontend runtime deployment contract from §12.8.
name: Runtime Infrastructure Security and Access Baseline
rationale: Runtime topology/security/deployment controls must be explicit to avoid late infra redesign.
summary: Deliver DB pool topology, frontend runtime deployment, edge controls, network isolation, and externalized secrets.
